title: 06009_Spherical_Fourier_Neural_Operators_Learning_Stable_Dynamics_on_the_Sphere
positive_examples: The SFNO has important implications for machine learning-based simulation of climate dynamics that could eventually help accelerate our response to climate change.
The proposed method enables long-term weather forecasting significantly more accessible, allowing predictions for an entire year to be computed within 13 minutes on a single GPU.
The SFNO architecture has predictive skill comparable to state-of-the-art models in numerical weather prediction, which can improve climate prediction and adaptation efforts.
